fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Sendy server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: From Name
fields.description: The 'From name' of your campaign

fields.label: From Email
fields.description: The 'From email' of your campaign

fields.label: Reply To
fields.description: The 'Reply to' of your campaign

fields.label: Title
fields.description: The 'Title' of your campaign

fields.label: Subject
fields.description: The 'Subject' of your campaign

fields.label: HTML Text
fields.description: The 'HTML version' of your campaign

fields.label: Send Campaign
fields.description: Whether to send the campaign as well and not just create a draft. Default is false.

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: excludeListIds, excludeSegmentIds, listIds, plainText, queryString, segmentIds, trackClicks, trackOpens)

endpoints.label: Add Subscriber

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Sendy server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Email
fields.description: Email address of the subscriber

fields.label: List ID
fields.description: The list ID you want to subscribe a user to. This encrypted & hashed ID can be found under View all lists section named ID.

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: country, gdpr, hp, ipaddress, name, referrer, silent)

fields.label: List ID
